prompt_variants.description: Standard direct NL2SQL instruction with no explicit constraint checklist.
prompt_variants.system_prompt: You are an NL2SQL assistant. Produce exactly one SQL query and no explanation.
prompt_variants.title: Baseline NL2SQL
prompt_variants.user_instruction: Translate the question into a single executable SQL query using the provided schema.

prompt_variants.description: Explicitly names SHR/POR/DIVR constraints before generation.
prompt_variants.system_prompt: You are an NL2SQL assistant. Produce exactly one SQL query and no explanation. Before finalizing, satisfy these hard constraints: SHR (schema references must exist), POR (avoid hardcoded predicate literals when a parameter can be used), and DIVR (literal/type compatibility in predicates).
prompt_variants.title: Constraint-Explicit
prompt_variants.user_instruction: Generate SQL that obeys SHR/POR/DIVR. Use named placeholders (for example :value) for runtime values instead of hardcoded literals.

prompt_variants.description: Frames SQL generation as a constrained specification-satisfaction task.
prompt_variants.system_prompt: You are an NL2SQL synthesis engine. Output exactly one SQL query. Treat generation as specification satisfaction under three invariants: (1) schema soundness (SHR), (2) parameterized predicates over literals (POR), and (3) operand domain compatibility (DIVR). If uncertain, prefer a conservative query that still respects all invariants.
prompt_variants.title: Formal-Spec
prompt_variants.user_instruction: Construct SQL that satisfies the question and all invariants. Use only declared tables/columns and parameter placeholders for external values.

baseline_nl2sql.generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM artist WHERE Artist_ID NOT IN (SELECT Artist_ID FROM exhibition WHERE Year = 2004);
baseline_nl2sql.question: Show all artist names who didn't have an exhibition in 2004.
baseline_nl2sql.reference_sql: SELECT name FROM artist EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM exhibition AS T1 JOIN artist AS T2 ON T1.artist_id  =  T2.artist_id WHERE T1.year  =  2004

baseline_nl2sql.generated_sql:
SELECT w.Workshop_Group_Name
FROM Drama_Workshop_Groups w
JOIN Bookings b ON w.Workshop_Group_ID = b.Workshop_Group_ID
WHERE b.Status_Code = 'stop';
baseline_nl2sql.question: What are the names of the workshop groups that have bookings with status code "stop"?
baseline_nl2sql.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Store_Name FROM Bookings AS T1 JOIN Drama_Workshop_Groups AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_Group_ID  =  T2.Workshop_Group_ID WHERE T1.Status_Code  =  "stop"

baseline_nl2sql.generated_sql: SELECT T3.keyphraseName FROM author AS T1 JOIN writes AS T2 ON T1.authorId = T2.authorId JOIN paperKeyphrase AS T4 ON T2.paperId = T4.paperId JOIN keyphrase AS T3 ON T4.keyphraseId = T3.keyphraseId WHERE T1.authorName = 'Luke Zettlemoyer'
baseline_nl2sql.question: What keywords are in papers by Luke Zettlemoyer ?
baseline_nl2sql.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.keyphraseid FROM paperkeyphrase AS t2 JOIN keyphrase AS t1 ON t2.keyphraseid  =  t1.keyphraseid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid JOIN writes AS t4 ON t4.paperid  =  t3.paperid JOIN author AS t5 ON t4.authorid  =  t5.authorid WHERE t5.authorname  =  "Luke Zettlemoyer";

baseline_nl2sql.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.booking_status_code FROM Apartments AS T1 JOIN Apartment_Bookings AS T2 ON T1.apt_id = T2.apt_id WHERE T1.apt_number = 'Suite 634'
baseline_nl2sql.question: Tell me the booking status code for the apartment with number "Suite 634".
baseline_nl2sql.reference_sql: SELECT T1.booking_status_code FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_number  =  "Suite 634"

baseline_nl2sql.generated_sql: SELECT T1.Title, T2.Name FROM song AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID = T2.Singer_ID
baseline_nl2sql.question: Show titles of songs and names of singers.
baseline_nl2sql.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID

constraint_explicit.generated_sql:
SELECT Name 
FROM artist 
WHERE Artist_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT Artist_ID 
    FROM exhibition 
    WHERE Year = 2004
);
constraint_explicit.question: Show all artist names who didn't have an exhibition in 2004.
constraint_explicit.reference_sql: SELECT name FROM artist EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM exhibition AS T1 JOIN artist AS T2 ON T1.artist_id  =  T2.artist_id WHERE T1.year  =  2004

constraint_explicit.generated_sql:
SELECT Workshop_Group_Name 
FROM Drama_Workshop_Groups 
WHERE Workshop_Group_ID IN (
    SELECT Workshop_Group_ID 
    FROM Bookings 
    WHERE Status_Code = :status_code
);
constraint_explicit.question: What are the names of the workshop groups that have bookings with status code "stop"?
constraint_explicit.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Store_Name FROM Bookings AS T1 JOIN Drama_Workshop_Groups AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_Group_ID  =  T2.Workshop_Group_ID WHERE T1.Status_Code  =  "stop"

constraint_explicit.generated_sql:
SELECT p.keyphraseName
FROM keyphrase p
JOIN paperKeyphrase pk ON p.keyphraseId = pk.keyphraseId
JOIN paper pa ON pk.paperId = pa.paperId
JOIN writes w ON pa.paperId = w.paperId
JOIN author a ON w.authorId = a.authorId
WHERE a.authorName = :authorName;
constraint_explicit.question: What keywords are in papers by Luke Zettlemoyer ?
constraint_explicit.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.keyphraseid FROM paperkeyphrase AS t2 JOIN keyphrase AS t1 ON t2.keyphraseid  =  t1.keyphraseid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid JOIN writes AS t4 ON t4.paperid  =  t3.paperid JOIN author AS t5 ON t4.authorid  =  t5.authorid WHERE t5.authorname  =  "Luke Zettlemoyer";

constraint_explicit.generated_sql:
SELECT ab.booking_status_code
FROM Apartment_Bookings ab
JOIN Apartments a ON ab.apt_id = a.apt_id
WHERE a.apt_number = :apartment_number;
constraint_explicit.question: Tell me the booking status code for the apartment with number "Suite 634".
constraint_explicit.reference_sql: SELECT T1.booking_status_code FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_number  =  "Suite 634"

constraint_explicit.question: Show titles of songs and names of singers.
constraint_explicit.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID

formal_spec.generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM artist WHERE Artist_ID NOT IN (SELECT Artist_ID FROM exhibition WHERE Year = 2004);
formal_spec.question: Show all artist names who didn't have an exhibition in 2004.
formal_spec.reference_sql: SELECT name FROM artist EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM exhibition AS T1 JOIN artist AS T2 ON T1.artist_id  =  T2.artist_id WHERE T1.year  =  2004

formal_spec.generated_sql:
SELECT w.Workshop_Group_Name
FROM Drama_Workshop_Groups w
JOIN Bookings b ON w.Workshop_Group_ID = b.Workshop_Group_ID
WHERE b.Status_Code = 'stop';
formal_spec.question: What are the names of the workshop groups that have bookings with status code "stop"?
formal_spec.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Store_Name FROM Bookings AS T1 JOIN Drama_Workshop_Groups AS T2 ON T1.Workshop_Group_ID  =  T2.Workshop_Group_ID WHERE T1.Status_Code  =  "stop"

formal_spec.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.keyphraseName
FROM keyphrase p
JOIN paperKeyphrase pk ON p.keyphraseId = pk.keyphraseId
JOIN paper pa ON pk.paperId = pa.paperId
JOIN writes w ON pa.paperId = w.paperId
JOIN author a ON w.authorId = a.authorId
WHERE a.authorName = 'Luke Zettlemoyer';
formal_spec.question: What keywords are in papers by Luke Zettlemoyer ?
formal_spec.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.keyphraseid FROM paperkeyphrase AS t2 JOIN keyphrase AS t1 ON t2.keyphraseid  =  t1.keyphraseid JOIN paper AS t3 ON t3.paperid  =  t2.paperid JOIN writes AS t4 ON t4.paperid  =  t3.paperid JOIN author AS t5 ON t4.authorid  =  t5.authorid WHERE t5.authorname  =  "Luke Zettlemoyer";

formal_spec.generated_sql:
SELECT ab.booking_status_code
FROM Apartment_Bookings ab
JOIN Apartments a ON ab.apt_id = a.apt_id
WHERE a.apt_number = 'Suite 634';
formal_spec.question: Tell me the booking status code for the apartment with number "Suite 634".
formal_spec.reference_sql: SELECT T1.booking_status_code FROM Apartment_Bookings AS T1 JOIN Apartments AS T2 ON T1.apt_id  =  T2.apt_id WHERE T2.apt_number  =  "Suite 634"

formal_spec.question: Show titles of songs and names of singers.
formal_spec.reference_sql: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID

scope.guardrail: Results are detector-based and scoped to sampled Spider/synthetic inputs. They should not be interpreted as execution accuracy or causal proof.
scope.summary: Prompt ablation using checker-detected SHR/POR/DIVR rates only.
